sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10548" key="a)ntisuzugi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισυζῠγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10548.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συζυγία</ref></xr>, of signs rising and setting at the same point of the horizon, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
